title: TradingView Premium Cracked Just Hit 5.2K Stars on GitHub 🚀
author: Constant_Humor181
selftext:
# 

What started as a private reverse-engineered project quickly gained massive traction across GitHub and recently crossed **5.2K stars**, drawing attention from traders worldwide.

After extensive private testing and continuous infrastructure improvements, we decided to bring it to Reddit and share full premium access, advanced charting tools, and our top Pine Script collection with the community.

The current release includes full premium functionality, real-time market data, replay mode, advanced layouts, Tradovate support, and unrestricted access to professional charting tools.

This is the first public release through **PrivateSoftHub**, with more premium software drops and exclusive builds coming soon.

[**Read Full Release Details on Reddit**](https://www.reddit.com/r/PrivateSoftHub/comments/1twe32f/tradingview_premium_lifetime_for_windows_major/)
